info.title: Teable App
info.description: Manage Data as easy as drink a cup of tea

post.description: Submit a reward claim (e.g., social share)

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request POST \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/space/%7BspaceId%7D/reward/claim \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN' \
  --header 'content-type: application/json' \
  --data '{"sourceType":"socialShare","sourceMetaData":{"platform":"x","postUrl":"string","postId":"string","snapshotId":"string","content":"string","username":"string","followerCount":0,"verifyResult":{"isValid":true,"errors":[{"message":"string","localization":{"i18nKey":"string","context":{"property1":null,"property2":null}}}]}}}'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

payload = "{\"sourceType\":\"socialShare\",\"sourceMetaData\":{\"platform\":\"x\",\"postUrl\":\"string\",\"postId\":\"string\",\"snapshotId\":\"string\",\"content\":\"string\",\"username\":\"string\",\"followerCount\":0,\"verifyResult\":{\"isValid\":true,\"errors\":[{\"message\":\"string\",\"localization\":{\"i18nKey\":\"string\",\"context\":{\"property1\":null,\"property2\":null}}}]}}}"

headers = {
    'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN",
    'content-type': "application/json"
}

conn.request("POST", "/api/space/%7BspaceId%7D/reward/claim", payload, headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

get.description: Get reward credit list for a space

200.description: Returns the list of reward credits

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request GET \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/space/%7BspaceId%7D/reward/credit-list \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

headers = { 'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN" }

conn.request("GET", "/api/space/%7BspaceId%7D/reward/credit-list", headers=headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

get.summary: Get admin reward overview by spaces
get.description: Get aggregated reward statistics grouped by space for admin management. Returns pending, approved, consumed, available and expiring amounts per space.

schema.description: Filter by created time from (ISO string)

parameters.description: Filter by created time from (ISO string)
parameters.name: createdTimeFrom

schema.description: Filter by created time to (ISO string)

parameters.description: Filter by created time to (ISO string)
parameters.name: createdTimeTo

200.description: Returns the reward overview grouped by spaces

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request GET \
  --url 'http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/admin/reward/overview?search=SOME_STRING_VALUE&createdTimeFrom=SOME_STRING_VALUE&createdTimeTo=SOME_STRING_VALUE&page=SOME_INTEGER_VALUE&pageSize=SOME_INTEGER_VALUE' \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

headers = { 'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN" }

conn.request("GET", "/api/admin/reward/overview?search=SOME_STRING_VALUE&createdTimeFrom=SOME_STRING_VALUE&createdTimeTo=SOME_STRING_VALUE&page=SOME_INTEGER_VALUE&pageSize=SOME_INTEGER_VALUE", headers=headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

get.description: Get paginated and filtered list of reward for admin management. Supports filtering by space, status, platform, verification result, and search.

schema.description: Search by postUrl, uniqueKey or userId

parameters.description: Search by postUrl, uniqueKey or userId
parameters.name: search

schema.description: Filter by created time from (ISO string)

parameters.description: Filter by created time from (ISO string)
parameters.name: createdTimeFrom

schema.description: Filter by created time to (ISO string)

parameters.description: Filter by created time to (ISO string)
parameters.name: createdTimeTo

200.description: Returns the paginated list of reward

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request GET \
  --url 'http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/admin/reward/list?spaceId=SOME_STRING_VALUE&sourceType=SOME_STRING_VALUE&status=SOME_STRING_VALUE&platform=SOME_STRING_VALUE&isValid=SOME_STRING_VALUE&search=SOME_STRING_VALUE&createdTimeFrom=SOME_STRING_VALUE&createdTimeTo=SOME_STRING_VALUE&page=SOME_INTEGER_VALUE&pageSize=SOME_INTEGER_VALUE' \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

headers = { 'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN" }

conn.request("GET", "/api/admin/reward/list?spaceId=SOME_STRING_VALUE&sourceType=SOME_STRING_VALUE&status=SOME_STRING_VALUE&platform=SOME_STRING_VALUE&isValid=SOME_STRING_VALUE&search=SOME_STRING_VALUE&createdTimeFrom=SOME_STRING_VALUE&createdTimeTo=SOME_STRING_VALUE&page=SOME_INTEGER_VALUE&pageSize=SOME_INTEGER_VALUE", headers=headers)

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

get.summary: Get all spaces with reward records
get.description: Get a list of all spaces that have reward records for admin filtering

200.description: Returns the list of spaces with reward records

  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/admin/reward/spaces \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN'

import http.client

headers = { 'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN" }

conn.request("GET", "/api/admin/reward/spaces", headers=headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

get.summary: Export admin reward list as CSV
get.description: Export all reward records for a specific space as CSV file. Supports filtering by date range.

schema.description: Space ID to export rewards for

parameters.description: Space ID to export rewards for
parameters.name: spaceId

schema.description: Filter by created time from (ISO string)

parameters.description: Filter by created time from (ISO string)
parameters.name: createdTimeFrom

schema.description: Filter by created time to (ISO string)

parameters.description: Filter by created time to (ISO string)
parameters.name: createdTimeTo

200.description: Returns the CSV file with reward records

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request GET \
  --url 'http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/admin/reward/export/%7BspaceId%7D?createdTimeFrom=SOME_STRING_VALUE&createdTimeTo=SOME_STRING_VALUE' \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

headers = { 'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN" }

conn.request("GET", "/api/admin/reward/export/%7BspaceId%7D?createdTimeFrom=SOME_STRING_VALUE&createdTimeTo=SOME_STRING_VALUE", headers=headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))
